name: Wyatt Cenac
blurb: He was a correspondent and writer on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart from 2008 to 2012, winning multiple writing Emmys with the staff, and later hosted the HBO docuseries Wyatt Cenacs Problem Areas.
bio: Wyatt Cenac is an American comedian, writer, and actor known for a low-key, observational style that often engages race, identity, and city life. He was a correspondent and writer on The Daily Show with Jon Stewart from 2008 to 2012, winning multiple writing Emmys with the staff, and later hosted the HBO docuseries Wyatt Cenacs Problem Areas. His stand-up specials include Comedy Person and Brooklyn.

timeline.ev: Joins The Daily Show as correspondent and writer
Comedy Central special Comedy Person premieres
Netflix special Wyatt Cenac: Brooklyn released
Stars in the TBS series People of Earth
HBO docuseries Wyatt Cenacs Problem Areas premieres

accolades: Shared Emmy wins for writing on The Daily Show
Brooklyn nominated for Best Comedy Album at the 58th Grammy Awards
Created and hosted HBOs Wyatt Cenacs Problem Areas

movies_tv.t: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
